fixes.origin:
sql = (
    "SELECT id, actor, action, resource, created_at "
    "FROM audit_events "
    "WHERE actor = '" + actor + "' "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    f"LIMIT {max_rows}"
)

cursor.execute(sql)
fixes.replacement:
sql = (
    "SELECT id, actor, action, resource, created_at "
    "FROM audit_events "
    "WHERE actor = ? "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC "
    "LIMIT ?"
)

cursor.execute(sql, (actor, max_rows))
